top_signals.title: UK defense secretary resigns in protest of government spending plan
top_signals.summary: In his resignation letter to Starmer, Healey said he had now seen the defense funding plan, and it “falls well short of what is required."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: EU to extend carbon border levy on metal products to prevent evasion
top_signals.summary: List expanded to almost 400 imported items with significant amount of steel or aluminium

top_signals.title: TV Tairiku Ondo channels the chaotic creativity of youth
top_signals.summary: After going viral with a 90-second track in 2024, the rock quartet from Hokkaido has been hitting stages big and small and working hard on a debut album.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
